name: The Last Commando - Shooting Game & Action Game

reviews.review_title: I would give zero stars if i could
reviews.review_description: this game is the definition of sh!t

MAYBE this will be updated a ton and be really good one day but right now, WOW. I wouldn’t get this if it were free. First complaint: I get 1 pistol, and never have to reload. It’s an unlimited pistol clip apparently. So no reload controls whatsoever. No way to drop the gun. No way to change guns since only 1 was offered on the 1st level. The enemy AI is especially stupid stupid stupid. You can be standing right in front of them and they’ll simply walk away like nothing is there. 

Save the $5 and instead pay someone to kick you in the nuts. THAT would be far less torturous than playing this for 1 minute longer. Sorry to be so rough. Just feel taken

developer_response.body: Hi, We are sorry to see you having problems with our game. We are committed to improving Commando Shooting Game and making it a more enjoyable experience for everyone. We encourage you to stay tuned for future updates as we address the issues you raised and continue to develop new features.
